parts.label: Header (Right Bank)
parts.function: Tubular header collecting exhaust from the three right-bank cylinders into a single collector.

parts.label: Header (Left Bank)
parts.function: Tubular header collecting exhaust from the three left-bank cylinders into a single collector.

parts.label: Catalytic Converter (Right)
parts.function: Converts harmful right-bank exhaust gases into less-toxic emissions over a ceramic catalyst.

parts.label: Catalytic Converter (Left)
parts.function: Converts harmful left-bank exhaust gases into less-toxic emissions over a ceramic catalyst.

parts.label: Muffler (Right)
parts.function: Rear silencer on the right side that attenuates exhaust noise before the tailpipes.

parts.label: Muffler (Left)
parts.function: Rear silencer on the left side that attenuates exhaust noise before the tailpipes.

parts.label: Tailpipe Tip (Right)
parts.function: Polished right-side tailpipe tip where exhaust exits the system.

parts.label: Tailpipe Tip (Left)
parts.function: Polished left-side tailpipe tip where exhaust exits the system.

parts.label: PSE Sport Exhaust Valve
parts.function: Vacuum-actuated bypass valve that opens the sport exhaust path for a louder note.

parts.label: Exhaust Hanger (Right)
parts.function: Rubber hanger that suspends the right side of the exhaust from the body.

parts.label: Exhaust Hanger (Left)
parts.function: Rubber hanger that suspends the left side of the exhaust from the body.

parts.label: Pre-Cat Oxygen Sensors (x2)
parts.function: Wideband lambda sensors mounted upstream of each primary catalytic converter to provide closed-loop fueling feedback to the DME.

parts.label: Post-Cat Oxygen Sensors (x2)
parts.function: Downstream oxygen sensors that monitor catalytic converter efficiency and report degradation to the DME.

parts.label: Mid-Pipe / X-Pipe
parts.function: Crossover pipe connecting both exhaust banks downstream of the primary catalytic converters to balance exhaust pulses.

parts.label: Secondary Catalytic Converters (x2)
parts.function: Underfloor secondary catalysts providing additional emissions treatment after the close-coupled primary converters.

parts.label: PSE Vacuum Line
parts.function: Vacuum supply line that routes actuating vacuum from the intake manifold to the PSE bypass valve actuator.

parts.label: Exhaust Pipe Clamp
parts.function: Band clamp that secures pipe-to-pipe joints in the exhaust system, preventing leaks and relative movement.

parts.label: Exhaust Clamping Sleeve
parts.function: Slip-on clamping sleeve used to join exhaust pipe sections at intermediate connections.

parts.label: Lambda Probe Holder
parts.function: Bracket that supports and positions the lambda probe wiring harness along the exhaust system routing.

parts.label: Exhaust Silencer Bracket (PSE)
parts.function: Steel mounting bracket that attaches the rear silencer to the body structure on PSE-equipped vehicles.

parts.label: Exhaust Manifold Bracket
parts.function: Support bracket that braces the exhaust manifold against vibration and thermal movement.
